element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn by clicking environmental objects and NPCs
Information gathering and puzzle clue discovery through conversation
Progressive complexity as players combine collected items to solve environmental puzzles
Using collected/combined items on environmental objects and NPCs to progress
Joey provides commentary and utility; circuit board can be transferred between robot bodies
Players discover mortality is possible (unlike most contemporary adventure games), requiring strategic saving
Exploration of dystopian city-state after escape from initial crash site
Uncovering conspiracy involving AI overlord and Union/Corporation conflict

typical_relief_triggers: Joey's humorous commentary on current robot shell
Lighthearted NPC dialogue balancing serious tone
Safe exploration periods in discovered areas
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Deliberate adventure game pacing with serious cyberpunk tone interspersed with humor; tension builds through narrative revelation and puzzle complexity rather than action sequences

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to point-and-click mechanics and item collection; safe exploration phase following kidnapping
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Puzzle complexity increases; item combination requirements become more sophisticated; narrative stakes rise with conspiracy discovery
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex multi-step puzzle chains; confrontation with systemic corruption (LINC and Union City hierarchy); resolution of political intrigue
notable_spikes: Initial kidnapping and helicopter crash (narrative shock)
Transition from wilderness to urban environment (mechanical/navigational shift)
Progressive revelation of LINC's omnipresence (thematic tension escalation)

notable_level_patterns.description: Opening establishes Robert's origin in the Gap (Australian Outback), his adoption by Aboriginals, survival skills, and creation of Joey robot before kidnapping event
Tutorial-like section establishing basic controls and interaction before entering Union City proper
Primary gameplay loop of navigating Union City, gathering clues through NPC dialogue and environmental interaction, solving puzzles to progress and reveal LINC's corruption
